message:
fix: clarify exclude_patterns comment in example project config

Changed "Additional patterns to exclude" to "Patterns to exclude
(replaces defaults if modified)" since the list now contains ALL
defaults and the merge semantics use full replacement, not append.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1878,7 +1878,7 @@ check_slots = 2
 [transfer]
 # zstd compression level (1-19)
 compression_level = 3
-# Additional patterns to exclude from transfer
+# Patterns to exclude from transfer (replaces defaults if modified)
 exclude_patterns = [
 {exclude_lines}]
